languages.text: {n}Этот человек разительно отличается от остальных своей развитой мускулатурой и крепким костяком. Его левая рука отсутствует вместе с частью плеча. Обрывки крупных сосудов, торчащие из аккуратно обработанной культи, закрыты причудливого вида заглушками, от которых тянутся провода в сторону лежащей рядом металлической руки. На шее мужчины вытатуирована эмблема блюстителей, увенчанная гербом династии фон Валанциус.{/n}

{n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Этот человек разительно отличается от остальных своей развитой мускулатурой и крепким костяком. Его левая рука отсутствует вместе с частью плеча. Обрывки крупных сосудов, торчащие из аккуратно обработанной культи, закрыты причудливого вида заглушками, от которых тянутся провода в сторону лежащей рядом металлической руки. На шее мужчины вытатуирована эмблема блюстителей, увенчанная гербом династии фон Валанциус.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

{n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The apparatus, machine spark passing along it every now and then, is forcing the man to remain conscious, and he watches you with agony-filled eyes. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. languages.text: {n}発達した筋肉と骨格を持つこの男は、他の者たちとは対照的な存在だ。彼の左腕は肩の一部と共に失われており、整えられた切断部からは大きな血管の断片が突き出ている。奇妙な形状をした端部が金属製の腕に接続されている。機械のスパークが時折流れる装置は、この男を意識させ、苦痛に満ちた眼差しでこちらを見つめている。彼の首には、エンフォースの紋章とフォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が刻まれている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The apparatus, machine spark passing along it every now and then, is forcing the man to remain conscious, and he watches you with agony-filled eyes. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}発達した筋肉と骨格を持つこの男は、他の者たちとは対照的な存在だ。彼の左腕は肩の一部と共に失われており、整えられた切断部からは大きな血管の断片が突き出ている。奇妙な形状をした端部が金属製の腕に接続されている。機械のスパークが時折流れる装置は、この男を意識させ、苦痛に満ちた眼差しでこちらを見つめている。彼の首には、エンフォースの紋章とフォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が刻まれている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}这个男人肌肉发达，骨骼强健，与其他人形成鲜明对比。他的左臂连同一部分肩膀不翼而飞，伤口切面平整，几根主血管的残端暴露在外。这些血管被奇怪的盖子封住，上面连着导线，通向放置在一旁的金属手臂上。他脖子上刺有执法者的徽记，徽记上方则是冯·瓦兰修斯的家族纹章。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con su musculatura desarrollada y sus fuertes huesos, este hombre contrasta con los demás. Ha perdido el brazo izquierdo y parte del hombro. Los jirones de las arterias principales sobresalen del muñón limpio, selladas con tornillos extraños conectados a un brazo de metal cercano. En su cuello está tatuado el emblema del personal de seguridad, rematado con el escudo de la casa von Valancius.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

Los jirones de las arterias principales sobresalen del muñón limpio, selladas con tornillos extraños conectados a un brazo de metal cercano. En su cuello está tatuado el emblema del personal de seguridad, rematado con el escudo de la casa von Valancius.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit seiner kräftigen Muskulatur und seinen starken Knochen bildet dieser Mann einen deutlichen Kontrast zu den anderen. Sein linker Arm und ein Teil seiner Schulter fehlen. Aus seinem sorgfältig versorgten Armstumpf ragen zerfetzte Adern, die mit bizarren Endkappen verschlossen und mit einem neben dem Mann liegenden Metallarm verbunden wurden. Auf den Nacken des Mannes wurde neben dem Emblem der Enforcer das Wappen derer von Valancius tätowiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cet homme se distingue radicalement des deux autres par sa musculature bien développée et ses os solides. Il a perdu son bras gauche ainsi qu'une partie de son épaule. Les artères du moignon tranché net ont été bouchées à l'aide d'étranges capuchons reliés à une prothèse métallique posée à côté. L'emblème des prévôts est tatoué sur son cou, surmonté du blason de la maison von Valancius.{/n}

Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İyi gelişmiş kas yapısı ve güçlü kemikleriyle bu adam, diğerleriyle tam bir tezat oluşturuyor. Sol kolu ve omzunun bir kısmı eksik. Düzgünce kesilmiş güdükten büyük damarların parçaları çıkıntı yapıyor, yakınlarda duran metal bir kola bağlı tuhaf görünümlü uç kapaklarıyla kapatılmışlar. Boynunda, üzerinde von Valancius arması bulunan infazcı amblemi dövmesi var.{/n}
